title: CreateAuditLogRequestBody
description: Request body for creating an audit log export request.

filter.description: Filters to apply to the exported audit log data.

startTime.description: Start of the time range in ISO 8601 format.

endTime.description: End of the time range in ISO 8601 format.

originatingUserId.description: Filter to events by a specific user.

eventType.description: Filter to a specific event type.

modelId.description: Filter to events affecting a specific model.

category.description: Filter to a specific event category.
